Label: Negligible
Description: No measurable change. Cosmetic or nice-to-have only.

Label: Minor
Description: Slight improvement for a small group. Won't move any KPI.

Label: Moderate
Description: Noticeable improvement for a defined segment. Moves a secondary metric.

Label: Significant
Description: Clear value for a strategic user group. Moves a primary KPI.

Label: Critical
Description: Transformative. Directly impacts revenue, retention, or core efficiency at scale.

Label: Trivial
Description: Less than 1 day. Config change or minor tweak.

Label: Massive
Description: 6+ weeks or multi-quarter. Multiple teams, high risk.

Label: Guessing
Description: No data, no user input, pure assumption.

Label: Hunch
Description: Anecdotal evidence. One conversation or personal observation.

Label: Some Data
Description: Multiple user signals, tickets, or analytics suggest the problem exists.

Label: Strong Signal
Description: User research, A/B results, or clear quantitative evidence.

Label: Proven
Description: Validated through experiment, pilot, or competitor proof.

Guardrail: Validated high-impact problem. Proceed to defining solutions.
Opportunity is real but not fully proven. Increase confidence or narrow scope.
Not strong enough to move forward. Missing evidence, impact, or clarity. Return to discovery.
Not a meaningful or well-understood problem. Do not move forward. Reframe or gather new data.
BLOCKED. Score not calculated. Return to discovery.
BLOCKED. Score not calculated. No evidence exists.
